creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some notes for maintainer:
#1, don't remove a portepoch.  (ever!)
#2, there are at least 4 other ports that rely on these (thrift-...) and 
we should coordinate with them because it will cause dependencies to fail.

ports are py-thrift and php52-thrift.


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
